zh.Grangärde, Kopparberg, Sweden: 瑞典可帕波格格朗亞德
zh.lifeSummary: Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten是Hans von Köller和Margarete Jacobsdatter的兒子，於1480年出生在瑞典達拉納諾波。他和Ingebor Iversdatter至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1571年在他的家鄉享年91歲。

zh-hans.Grangärde, Kopparberg, Sweden: 瑞典可帕波格格朗亞德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten是Hans von Köller和Margarete Jacobsdatter的儿子，于1480年出生在瑞典達拉納諾波。他和Ingebor Iversdatter至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1571年在他的家乡享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thollefsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Tollef, Thor.

Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Tollef, a variant of Torleiv, from Old Norse Thorleifr, formed with Thórr, the name of the Scandinavian god of thunder (see Thor ) + leifr ‘heir, descendant’.

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Erland, Eyvind, Nels.  Southeast Asian Chor, Tong, Chia, Chu, Kong, Seng, Tou, Chee, Ching, Chou, Chue, Eng, Thai, Moua, Neng, Pao, Yeng, Yer, Blong, Chong, Choua, Houa, Shoua, Soua.
Swedish and Danish: from a short form of any of various Scandinavian personal names containing the first element Thor (Old Norse Thórr), the name of the god of thunder in Scandinavian mythology.
English: from the Anglo-Scandinavian name Thōr, Thūr, probably short forms of Old Norse compound names in Thór-, Thúr- (see 1 above).

variants.name: Tollefson
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian   Tollefsen  . Compare   Tolleson  .

variants.name: Tollefsrud
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from seven farmsteads in southeastern Norway, so named from the personal name Tollef (see Tollefsen ) + rud, from Old Norse ruth ‘clearing’.

variants.name: Tolleson
meanings: Americanized form of Swedish Tollesson: rare patronymic from a variant of the personal name Torleiv (see Tollefsen ).
Altered form of   Tollefson  , a surname of Norwegian origin.

nameMeanings.name: Jotten
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms named Botn, Botten, or Botnen, from Old Norse botn ‘small valley, valley end’. Compare Botner .

variants.name: Button
meanings: metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of buttons, from Old French bo(u)ton ‘knob, lump’, specialized to mean ‘button’. Compare Butner .
habitational name from Booton in Norfolk, named with either the Old English personal name Bōta or the Old Norse personal name Bō + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Rasmus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of New Testament origin, where it is a shortened form of the Latin name Erastus (Greek Erastos, from erān ‘to love’). This was the name of the treasurer of Corinth converted to Christianity by St Paul (Romans 16:23).

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: The Protestant Reformation
historicEvents.description: The Protestant Reformation in Sweden occurred as King Gustav Vasa of Sweden, aided by his chancellor Laurentius Andreae, a Swedish Lutheran clergyman, broke ties with Rome and the Roman Catholic church in 1527.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.
Peace of Stettin concluded. Denmark recognized independence of Sweden. Sweden gave up claim to Norway.

en.lifeSummary: Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten was born in 1480, in Norbo, Dalarna, Sweden as the son of Hans von Köller and Margarete Jacobsdatter. He had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Ingebor Iversdatter. He died in 1571, in his hometown, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten est né en 1480, à Norbo, Dalarna, Suède, fils de Hans von Köller et Margarete Jacobsdatter. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Ingebor Iversdatter. Il est décédé en 1571, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten wurde 1480 in Norbo, Dalarna, Schweden, als Sohn von Hans von Köller und Margarete Jacobsdatter geboren. Er hatte mit Ingebor Iversdatter mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1571 im Alter von 91 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten è nato il nel 1480 nel Norbo, Dalarna, Svezia come figlio di Hans von Köller e Margarete Jacobsdatter. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Ingebor Iversdatter. Morì nel 1571, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rasmus Thollefsen Jottenは1480年にスウェーデンダラーナノーボでHans von KöllerとMargarete Jacobsdatterの息子として生まれた。彼はIngebor Iversdatterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1571年に故郷で91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten(은)는 1480년 스웨덴 다라른아 노르보에서 Hans von Köller(와)과 Margarete Jacobsdatter의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Ingebor Iversdatter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 그의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten nasceu em 1480, em Norbo, Dalarna, Suécia filho de Hans von Köller e Margarete Jacobsdatter. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Ingebor Iversdatter. Ele faleceu em 1571, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten родился в 1480 г. в местности норбо, даларна, Швеция. Его родителей звали Hans von Köller и Margarete Jacobsdatter. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Ingebor Iversdatter. Он умер в 1571 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Rasmus Thollefsen Jotten nació en 1480, en Norbo, Dalarna, Suecia como hijo de Hans von Köller y Margarete Jacobsdatter. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Ingebor Iversdatter. Murió en 1571, en su pueblo, a la edad de 91 años.
